rows.label: tev071101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev071101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask San'luarb about Blue Bloods.

rows.label: tev071101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev071101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask San'luarb if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev071101_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask San'luarb about recent developments.

rows.label: tev071101_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask San'luarb what he intends to do next.

rows.label: tev071101_MSG0001
rows.name:
I understand that due to the complexity
of their construction, you are suffering
from regular shortages of parts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG0002
rows.name:
I suggested to some of your scientists that they
consider using Orphe-made biotic components
instead, but my idea was summarily dismissed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG0003
rows.name:
I was told that the parts
appeared unreliable, as well
as being quite...revolting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Hmm? You aren't familiar with biotic
components? Well, to put it simply, they're
extremely high-quality, living parts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG0005
rows.name:
They are not dissimilar to the maggots
of your native Earth, except that they
are programmed to move in certain ways.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG0010
rows.name:
I, along with my underling, Non'barac,
create components used by Orphe Parfait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Our inability to ensure a steady supply of
the miranium that we use as a primary material
has been a source of much vexation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG0012
rows.name:
You are a BLADE, are you not? I would ask that
you find a way to rapidly expand your FrontierNet
in order to improve miranium mining capacity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG0013
rows.name:
And please do hurry—we have already
used up our entire miranium supply.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG1001
rows.name:
My people do not naturally arrange ourselves
into the sorts of hierarchical structures
that you humans seem drawn to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG1002
rows.name:
Nevertheless, in an attempt to emulate a
human-style corporation, I adopted a leadership
role with Non'barac serving beneath me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG1003
tev071101_MSG1004
rows.name:
She has since been handling the company's planning
and negotiating with the humans, while I have
devoted myself merely to crafting components.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG1005
rows.name:
Could we have experienced a reversal
of roles? ...Not that I would
particularly mind if this were true.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG1010
rows.name:
In the absence of the Growth, there is
likely to be less demand for armaments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG1011
rows.name:
Therefore, it is imperative that
we expand our line of biotic devices
into new product categories.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG1012
rows.name:
I understand that you humans
are repulsed by the appearance
of maggot-like creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG1013
rows.name:
But I assure you that while the products may appear
to be alive, they are made primarily from miranium,
and will not harm you even if touched directly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071101_MSG1014
rows.name:
Perhaps one idea might be a product that allows you
to effectively shower without water. They could
remove filth from your bodies simply by undulating.[ST:wait ]
